rulings.Case Title: SHARON WOODY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Edward Woody
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, August 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Frontier Building Supply Co.¿s motion for terminating sanctions against plaintiff Edward Woody is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendant informs Mr. Woody of this tentative ruling and he states that he does not wish to contest. The hearing on this motion will be at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)
